calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Withdrawal Of Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Laila Aljurf present in pro per.

Ms. Aljurf stated that there were miscommunications with the attorney and she was not given notice due to the changed of her mailing address, and the receipts were turned in late, and she is requesting to withdraw her petition.
The Court noted that the request to withdrawal of funds from blocked account will not be granted and denied without prejudice. Ms. Aljurf to refile an amended petition and the court will review it internally. Ms. Aljurf was advised by the Court to update her current mailing address.

Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: R. Hill; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/C. Herbert.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made.

The Court stated that the receipts were submitted, no further status is required, and that no further withdrawals are allowed from this account.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Continued To Nov-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: James McElroy appeared.
Mr. McElroy reported that he has not gotten any response from the Guardian Ad Litem and that she has not provided any receipts. The court will issue an order for a bench warrant to Ms. Aljurf for her attachment. The bench warrant will be suspended for 30 days. If the receipts are not filed by Nov 5, 2007 the court will release the bench warrant. The matter was continued to 11/05/07.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Rob Harris Clerk: Rosie Noguera
